explanation: Inserted quotes around the executable path and script file path to test if the Sigma rule is sensitive to quoted command-line arguments.
Original command line without any mutation, used as a baseline for comparison.
Added a trailing space to the command line to test if the Sigma rule is sensitive to trailing whitespace.
Reordered arguments are not applicable here since the script file is the only argument.
Substituted no flags since the original command does not include any flags to substitute.
Omitted no elements since the original command is already minimal.
Encoded no elements since the original command does not require encoding for execution.
